remaining_tasks.name: 03-01: 渲染工具调用和审批流
03-02: 加入停止、重试与继续控制
03-03: 接入模型 / provider 选择器

decisions.decision: Phase 03 should build directly on the completed streaming chat surface
decisions.rationale: The browser chat transport and message rendering are already in place, so the next phase can focus on observability and control without reworking transport plumbing.

decisions.decision: Keep the core agent/runtime architecture intact
decisions.rationale: The repo direction remains a WebUI wrapper around Dexter's existing engine, not a rewrite of the agent or tool stack.

next_action: Start with Phase 03 plan 03-01: render tool calls and approval flow in the browser UI.
context_notes: Phase 02 is complete and verified. The workspace is clean and ready to begin transparency-focused UI work for tools, approvals, and run controls.
